purpose: Export of all experiments with hypotheses for literature research. Study fields are intentionally empty — to be filled by research AI.

experiments.name: Morning Sunlight
experiments.hypothesis: Consistent morning sunlight for 7 days will produce measurable improvements in Sleep and Energy.
